allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $mcp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/healthz" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "MCP /healthz: OK \($\($mcp | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "MCP /healthz: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { $be = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Backend /api/health: status=$\($be.status\) tools=$\($be.tool_count\) mcp=$\($be.mcp_sse_url\)" } catch { Write-Host "Backend /api/health: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
